title: Claude/train optimized model xc45 w
author: sargonxg

data.description: Finite-state transducer predictor for structural web-text patterns, including HTML tags, boilerplate phrases, and URL/JSON/date pattern matching.
Order-8 backward-looking n-gram cache with Modified Kneser-Ney smoothing and continuation-count lower-order distributions.
LZ77-style longest substring matching predictor over already-scored tokens, using suffix-indexed lookup.
Gated Linear Network used to mix expert predictions online with context bins derived from neural entropy and exponentiated-gradient updates.
Entropy-adaptive blending of multiple predictors using neural entropy as context.

novel_contributions: Ontology-augmented generation applied to text compression
Five complementary predictors blended at evaluation time with zero artifact cost
Finite-state transducer predictor for structural web-text patterns
Order-8 n-gram cache with Modified Kneser-Ney smoothing
LZ77-style substring match model for long-range prediction
Gated Linear Network context mixer with entropy-based context bins
